SELECT histogram(3)(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_histogram WHERE value > 0);
WITH histogram(4)(rand() % 100) AS hist SELECT arrayJoin(hist).3 AS height FROM (SELECT * FROM system.numbers LIMIT 50);
SELECT histogram(5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM system.numbers WHERE number < 20);
WITH histogram(6)(value) AS hist SELECT arrayJoin(hist).1 AS lower_bound, arrayJoin(hist).2 AS upper_bound, arrayJoin(hist).3 AS height FROM test_histogram;
WITH (SELECT histogram(5)(value) FROM test_histogram) AS hist_result SELECT arrayJoin(hist_result).1, arrayJoin(hist_result).2 FROM test_histogram;
SELECT histogram(10)(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_histogram WHERE value >= 0) WHERE value < 100;
WITH histogram(2)(value) AS hist_result SELECT arrayJoin(hist_result) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_histogram);
SELECT histogram(4)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100);
